title: 미국 세부 산업 ETF 모멘텀 상위 2종과 QQQ 비교
hypothesis: 서로 겹치는 상위 섹터 ETF 대신 세부 산업 ETF 20개를 고정하고, SOXX와 XLC를 포함한 모멘텀 상위 2종을 기존 계좌·매도 규칙으로 운용하면 11개 섹터 ETF 전략과 QQQ 계속 보유보다 성과가 개선될 수 있다.

noveltyContract.novelDimension: 기존 11개 상위 섹터를 기술·금융·헬스케어·에너지·산업재·소비재의 세부 산업 ETF로 분해하고, 반도체 대표는 SOXX, 통신·플랫폼 대표는 XLC로 사전 고정한다.

dataContract.source: Yahoo Finance adjusted daily close frozen in price-snapshot.json.gz
dataContract.universe: SOXX, XSW, XLC, KRE, KCE, KIE, XBI, XPH, XHE, XHS, XOP, XES, XAR, XTN, XRT, XHB, XME, RWR, XLP, XLU
dataContract.taxonomy: Mostly S&P Select Industry ETFs plus SOXX and residual broad XLC, XLP, XLU; no individual-company taxonomy
dataContract.survivorshipNote: The test asks how today's fixed ETF menu behaved historically and does not reconstruct closed or historically available competing ETFs.
dataContract.incompleteMonthRule: Do not create a signal until the calendar month's last Friday has occurred

capitalContract.fxSource: Returns are measured in the USD account before KRW/USD changes
capitalContract.allocation: First six buy signals use 10% of current equity per ETF; then 7.5%; use 5% when cash ratio is 10% or lower

executionContract.signalTiming: last tradable close on or before each calendar month's last Friday
executionContract.exitRule: Sell 50% at cohort month 6; extend the remainder only when weekly close is at or above MA10 and RSI14 is at least 50; sell after two confirmed weekly closes below MA10 or at cohort month 12
executionContract.weeklyExitExecution: next trading day after the second weekly close confirms the break
executionContract.benchmarkRule: Invest the full account in QQQ on the candidate strategy's first entry date and hold through the identical last valuation date
